templates.name: General Task
templates.instruction: Complete the task described below using the project's conventions and tooling.
templates.context:
## Input

(Describe the task.)

## Scope

- In scope: as described
- Out of scope: unrelated refactors
goals: Deliver the outcome described in the instruction
Document assumptions and verification steps
templates.outputFormat: Structured markdown: Summary, Changes, Verification, Follow-ups (if any).
templates.constraints: Do not bypass Control Hub APIs for state changes. Run tests/build when touching application code.
